Celebrities explore landscapes in Yorkshire and Cumbria. The Rev Richard Coles walks through the North York Moors and along the Sutton Bank. His journey takes him to the ruins of Rievaulx Abbey, once one of Englands most powerful Cistercian monasteries. where he reflects on the need for silent contemplation

Chris Packham explores unusual and unexplained natural events that occur around the world during winter, enlisting the aid of leading scientists to uncover why these strange events happen. The programme examines unusual weather conditions, including tornadoes made of snow, and animals behaving in unexpected ways, from snowboarding crows to penguins attempting death-defying feats

Alan Yentob tells the story of how Leonardo Da Vincis Mona Lisa became the most famous painting in the world. Admired by six million tourists every year, surrounded by bodyguards and encased in a humidified, air-conditioned box protected by bullet-proof glass, the enigmatic masterpiece has been stolen, vandalised and exploited over the centuries. With the help of leading scholars and original research, the subject of the portrait is finally revealed - along with the reason behind her inscrutable smile

programmes.t: Britains Pompeii: A Village Lost in Time
programmes.d: Professor Alice Roberts joins the team excavating a 3,000-year-old Bronze Age village in the Cambridgeshire Fens that burned to the ground and was preserved in peat. Archaeologists also investigate the cause of the fire. Was it just a terrible accident, or did the villagers wealth provoke an attack?

programmes.t: On Camera: Photographers at the BBC
programmes.d: The working practices, lives and opinions of some of the greatest photographers of the last 60 years, drawn from the BBCs archives. The programme brings into focus the key genres - fashion, portraiture, documentary and landscape - and the characters behind the camera who have helped defined them, including Norman Parkinson, David Bailey, Eve Arnold and Martin Parr

programmes.t: The Magical World of Julia Donaldson
programmes.d: Celebration of the life and work of the bestselling childrens author, with animated sequences by long-term illustrator Axel Scheffler bringing her story to life. The film reveals the surprising stories behind iconic characters like the Gruffalo, Zog and Stick Man, and explores how her simple but poignant handling of themes of love, loss, fear and tyranny appeal to children and adults alike. Narrated by Julie Walters, and featuring readings from Donaldsons books by Helena Bonham Carter, Imelda Staunton and James McAvoy

programmes.t: Woolly Mammoth: Secrets from the Ice
programmes.d: Alice Roberts explores the natural history of the ice age mammals that once roamed across what is now Europe and Asia. Detailed information about their lives has been gleaned from carcasses preserved in the Siberian permafrost, and the anatomist meets scientists using genetic, chemical and molecular tests to reveal the adaptations that allowed mammoths to evolve from tropical animals to creatures capable of surviving extreme cold

Documentary following solar scientist Dr Lucie Green as she reveals how some of the UKs worst and most dramatic weather disasters occurred many years ago, despite the popular belief that the brunt of climate change has been felt in the 21st-century. Considering how many people today are pre-warned about potential catastrophes due to innovations in weather prediction, the presenter learns how an 18th-century storm surge once led to a the deaths of a thousand workers in Somerset fields, a hurricane drowned a fifth of Britains naval officers, and several brutal winters threatened to completely shut down most services in the country

Composer Howard Goodall uncovers the often turbulent and uncomfortable relationship between carols and the celebration of Christmas. Though around since the 12th century, the hymns have only been a feature of services for the past 150 years, as the Church believed them to be pagan or of no value. They have been used as secret codes, saved from the brink of extinction and subject to state censorship. The programme includes performances by folk star Bella Hardy, the Purbeck Village Choir and the Truro Cathedral Choir, who recreate the very first Service of Nine Lessons and Carols

programmes.d: Welcome back to Elmore, where the laws of reality are a joke, and family life is anything but ordinary.

After they receive an extravagant invitation to Masamis birthday party Gumball and Darwin are anxious to find just the right gift for her. However theyre not the only ones. / Elmore residents are going missing, and the cause of these disappearances may be closer to home than Gumball and Darwin think. / Mom and the kids depart for their hard days work leaving a seemingly lazy Dad half-asleep on the sofa. Mom has given him one very simple job: buy mayonnaise. / A compilation of some of the funniest, most bizarre clips uploaded onto the internet by the people of Elmore.

Gumball and Darwin try to tear themselves away from the internet, but end up falling down the Elmore Stream-hole. / Mr Small feels that he hasnt inspired the children of Elmore Junior High, so Gumball and Darwin try to lift his spirits. / Gumball and Darwin agree to do all of Tobiass chores, in exchange for good points! / Gumball, Darwin and Carrie team up to convince their fellow students that the school is haunted.

An impromptu hug with a stranger at school leaves Gumball in an increasingly awkward social situation. / Gumball and Darwin persuade Bobert to upgrade his operating system, then start to wish they hadnt. / Tobias follows every single high-five with a butt-slap so when Gumball doesn’t get one he feels insulted. He tries to get Tobias to slap his rear all day but it doesn’t work. / The Parent Teacher Association of Elmore Junior High bans video games, so the kids try and prove that games arent a bad influence.

Ever wondered what the people of Elmore dream about? As night falls in Elmore the Moon takes us on a tour through the various dreams - and nightmares - of the inhabitants. / Gumball is late to meet Penny at the mall, but a series of misunderstandings on the way only delay him further. / When Rob purchases a universal remote from the Awesome Store he discovers he can control the universe. He rewinds into the past and remembers Gumball had left him in The Void. / Anais arrives in the bedroom to find a messy crime-scene and her Daisy doll missing. She realises Gumball and Darwin are the chief suspects. / Gumball and Darwin are devastated to learn that Mr. Robinson - their favourite person in the world - is selling his house and leaving town. / When Grandpa Louie gives them a cheque, the Watterson kids argue over how to spend the money. / Gumball and Darwin are shocked to realise that their class isnt the only one in Elmore Junior High. / A mysterious figure from Nicoles past shows up and challenges her to a fight, but the kids are surprised when she refuses.

Gumball and Darwin’s martial arts costumes make them a laughing stock at school. / Gumball is traumatised when accidentally kissed on the mouth by his Grandma JoJo. / Gumball and Darwin are invited to a high school party and have to bring a date! / Gumball and Darwin unsuccessfully attempt to get a refund for their computer game. / Gumball discovers that Bobert is planning to take over his identity and replace him! / Gumball and Darwin barely survive a school picnic in the Forest of Doom.

Gumball sets out to win his Dad back by winning a blindfolded dumb race. / Gumball almost loses his mind trying to guess Darwins secret. / Gumball and Darwin are taught confusing lessons about honesty by the school councillor. / Darwin is sent away to a government institute for geniuses. ...The Birthday Bluesies/The Prince and The Chosen One/The Prince and the Tickly Torment => When Prince Ivandoe saves the life of a Wishapillar, he is granted a wish. / When Prince Ivandoe gets a case of the “Birthday Bluesies”, Bert is determined to throw him a Stag Kingdom party with all of his favourite treats. / When Bert unknowingly pulls a sword from a stone, he is suddenly appointed the leader of the Heroic Council of Heroes. / Prince Ivandoe stumbles across a secret meeting of the Royal Society for the Punishment of Peasants.

Gumball and Darwin give Bobert specific instructions to ensure he acts safely. When Bobert starts applying his robot logic to their rules they realise they must be much clearer. / Richard discovers that going into a bank whilst wearing a motorcycle helmet can land you in a lot of trouble. / Gumball kind of teaches Darwin how to be a skater… / The Wattersons fear the worst when they are summoned to a Town Hall meeting but are pleasantly surprised when theyre offered a brand new house.

A runaway from a summer camp ends up at the Stump, but Craig suspects her story may not be what it seems. / An accidental stink bomb explosion causes the kids to evacuate the Creek, but Craig takes it upon himself to rescue those left behind in the stench.
Apple and Onion want to become this weeks Most Fun People./Apple and Onion need to join an exclusive club to see a rare whale.
An injured El Kabong mistakenly hires a cursed mummy to take over his teaching duties. / Doggy Daddy transforms a bunch of folks into Augie so he can spend even more time with her.

The Titans day at the beach is interrupted by something vicious in the ocean. / The Titans encourage King Shark to start playing pool again but he must first learn how to trust his gut.
Clarence dozes off and enters a whimsical dreamscape. / Ms. Baker introduces a new student a short little kid.

programmes.t: The Wonderfully Weird World of Gumball
programmes.d: The Wattersons must get Anais to Daisyland before the park closes for good. / Gumball and Penny must stay together all day to prove their bond, defying Mr. Small’s astrological prediction.

The crew stop to stock up on croconuts, but Lana gets enticed by a plant that causes Boreas to react strangely. / Lana scrambles to complete a quest to save her Guild membership, but Horatius sabotages her efforts. Can she finish in time?
The teenage superheroes fight to save the world while getting up to mischievous antics

programmes.t: The Wonderfully Weird World of Gumball
programmes.d: Anais starts aging prematurely due to the stress and pressure of looking out for the rest of her stupid family. / After tasting Masami’s gourmet, double-truffle mac-n-cheese at lunch, Gumball decides to do whatever it takes to get a full serving of the delicious meal.

Lanas first cake offering is ruined by Sprog. Now she must bake another to calm a whirlpool and save the Mighty Windbreaker. / Lana clashes with her dad over a boomerang and hammer until teamwork saves them from the Arachno Queens web of doom.
The teenage superheroes fight to save the world while getting up to mischievous antics
Comedy following the surreal misadventures of Mordecai and Rigby, a pair of park groundskeepers who face a daily battle against their boss, Benson
Finn goes on adventures with Jake the dog
To reach the highest rank in the Bat Scouts, Robin teaches the other Titans important vigilante skills.

programmes.t: The Wonderfully Weird World of Gumball
programmes.d: Welcome back to Elmore, where the laws of reality are a joke, and family life is anything but ordinary.

Gumball and Darwin think its one of those days when nothing interesting is happening. But as they walk around Elmore it appears exciting things are happening just not to them. / The kids find out that Richard has been being picked on by the same person since high school. / Darwin likes a girl in his class so Gumball decides it’s time to play cupid. / Darwin finds it harder than expected to give up his favourite foodstuff.

Gumball and Darwin discover the real reason Dads diet wasnt working. / When Carmens nitpicking gets out of hand, Gumball decides to be the nitpickiEST. / The Wattersons discover a family of cartoon copycats who mimic their every move. / Gumball and Darwin give Bobert specific instructions to ensure he acts safely. When Bobert starts applying his robot logic to their rules they realise they must be much clearer.

When the Wattersons internet cuts out, they have to adapt to a world without it. / When Richard hears the urban legend of a secret Joyful Burger, he will stop at nothing to devour it. / When Leslies petals begin falling off he feels like his good looks are fading Gumball and Darwin use everything they know about style and beauty to try and help him. / Rocky is trying to find love with the help of the latest dating app…

When they see the school bullies making fun of Sussie Gumball and Darwin decide to try and help her act less weird. / Gumball becomes a sorcerer’s apprentice. / The Wattersons fear the worst when they are summoned to a Town Hall meeting but are pleasantly surprised when theyre offered a brand new house. / Gumball Darwin and Anais find themselves plunged into an RPG version of Elmore. / The Wattersons will do whatever it takes to get into the first screening of the latest Stellar Odyssey sequel. / Gumballs smart answers arent the correct ones and hes forced to go back to kindergarten. / The Wattersons compete over who has the worst life / Anais has made a new friend, so Gumball and Darwin immediately assume there must be something wrong with him.

Gumball and Darwin accidentally destroy Mr Robinson’s new car… or do they? / Gumball experiences an impossibly unfortunate chain of events. / Gumball and Darwin accidentally create a loveable monster that eats their family. / Gumball is embarrassed when Mum comes to school to spend some “quality time”. / Gumball’s magic tinfoil helmet threatens to tear the Watterson family apart! / Anais is convinced that Gumball is being bullied by Tina Rex.
Animated adventures with Gumball and his friend Darwin in a world where 2D and 3D combine
Bitzer dives into a pond to retrieve his ball, and when Shaun sees a muddy creature making its way across the field, he is convinced he has caught a glimpse of a swamp monster

A jam monster springs to life in Danger HQ when Squawks experiment goes awry - and with DM and Squawk busy competing for Penfolds favour no one has noticed. With the voices of Alexander Armstrong and Kevin Eldon
The heroes let Mr Friendlyfaces niece tag along on a quest

programmes.t: Boy Girl Dog Cat Mouse Cheese
programmes.d: The CEO buys Jockos old amusement arcade and vows to tear it down. However, Boy loves the arcade and challenges her to an epic videogame battle with the fate of the arcade at stake!
Topical news magazine for children.
The Lemmings activate the air conditioners AI, causing it to fall in love with the fridge
Grizzy finds a polar bear and realises they are from the same species
Patrick and SpongeBob help Bubble Bass move out of his mothers basement
When Mayor Macklemore catches a case of the Sing-A-Longs, Olive and Otto must discover the cause before the Mayor sings his way out of his job
Que becomes an unexpected viral hit when she is filmed scaring some teens. Enjoying the spotlight, will she risk exposure for fame and fortune?
Its a big day at Pottsfield Leisure Centre - there is a new boss in town. Sharon Granger means business and wants to create an advert to bring in more customers and make her mark
Learn about heavy and light, weighing and measuring, greater than, less than and equal to.
The doctors investigate how your body digests fat, and show you how to make bile art!
Cam, Tyler and Aaron explore the wildlife of Britains urban areas, encountering peregrine falcons, hedgehogs and water voles

The team heads north to Alaska, where days and nights of freezing weather must be endured to catch a glimpse of a wolverine. Some cheeky Arctic foxes are also spotted, and Steve Backshall resolves not to leave the state until he has seen a grizzly bear
Jadon explains why the former president of the United States, Barack Obama, is a hero to him.
Stan from Cumbria is a talented artist who needs a den to work on his illustrations
Dr Chris and Dr Xand demonstrate a strange trick that will amaze people, and reveal how the human body repairs itself after injury

A confused soldier spends his first day in the trenches during the Great War, William Wallace launches his music career as a rock rebel, Lady Jane Grey wins a terrible competition and the Welsh women of Fishguard defeat a French invasion
When a pop star arrives to open the new reception, Joy asks Danny and Mick to welcome her
After Moxy’s drums go missing, Andy concludes it was their rival band, Sandy and the Same Socks! Getting paranoid, a chase ensues as Andy accuses them of stealing everything!
Callum has taken Adam and Joe’s phones, and they must abseil down the worlds tallest abseil tower to get them back. Meanwhile, Joel M teaches Joe a trick or two about disappearing.
The Octonauts race to save a herd of reindeer as a volcanic eruption melts a glacier.
Dad needs some training to pass his astronaut fitness test
When Jeopardy Mouse wins the agent of the month competition, Danger Mouse and Penfold are forced to travel to New York for a lesson and to take on the criminal organisation known as Hydrant
Penfolds addiction to social media helps the Baron turn all of Danger Mouses secrets against him in a plot to deflate the planet
The heroes quest to defend the forest from stinky compost
In preparation for his mothers visit, an orc summons the Ninjas to find an orc cleaner to make his house dirty again after two fairies cleaned up his mess.

programmes.t: Winx Club - The Magic Is Back
programmes.d: The Winx plan a day of adventure in Magixia, but Griseldas restrictions and an incomplete project keep them grounded... until Robin helps them sneak away.
Two nine-year-old old boys live every childs Christmas dream of flying with The Snowman as they recreate the magical story on Londons West End stage
Ginger is excited that her UK family will be flying out to Australia for her birthday
The farmer prepares for a date by dusting off his prized hairpiece, but Shaun loses it while showing off to the flock and enlists Bitzers aid to find it before the big night
The gang finds out that JJ has a set of pre-match good-luck rituals and in the run-up to an important Blamjitsu event, Walter deviously throws bad-luck omens into JJs path
The heroes quest to get Hoofiuss Toby Jug back from the depths of the Riddling Ruins and are faced with a series of puzzles and traps to solve

programmes.t: Boy Girl Dog Cat Mouse Cheese
programmes.d: When Cat coughs up a magic hairball, the siblings use it to make all their decisions for them. However, when the hairball leads them to give away all their possessions, they realise it might not be so magical after all.

programmes.t: Boy Girl Dog Cat Mouse Cheese
programmes.d: One day the kids answer the door to find Wedgie, Cheeses missing piece! Wedgie is happy to have finally found her family but is so cute that Cheese gets jealous. Things only get worse when Wedgie starts accusing Cheese of being mean to her.
Grizzy confiscates the remote control device, but the Lemmings find another one
Plankton tells his Grandma that he owns the Krusty Krab, but must keep the lie going when she comes to visit
Atticus starts a band during a rainy lunch and makes Battie reluctantly join
When an unlucky coin is accidentally released into the public, the agents must retrieve it before the world ends
Pimple escapes, leaving the gang trapped in one of Helsings bottles. The only way out is to confess their truths and shed their teenage insecurities
While falling, Grizzy performs a series of acrobatics that amazes the Lemmings.
Mr Krabs makes SpongeBob and Squidward clean up Bikini Bottom. A sea bunny ravages Squidwards garden
Liko, Roy and Dot investigate a report of Pokemon affected by Laquium.
Peso competes in an annual tournament - the Iron Clam Competition

Keen but accident-prone dragon Zog gets himself into mischief while learning how to fly, roar, breathe fire and fight knights in his first four years at Dragon School. Each year he meets a kindly young girl who patches up his bumps and bruises, but can she help him with his trickiest challenge yet? Its year five and he has to capture a princess. Animated adaptation of Julia Donaldson and Axel Schefflers book, featuring the voices of Lenny Henry, Tracey Ullman, Hugh Skinner, Patsy Ferran and Kit Harington

Animated adaptation of Snuff. Village knight Sir Thomas Magpie despairs that his clumsy page will ever learn the tricky skills he needs to one day be a knight himself. However, when four thieves threaten to raid a local bootmakers shop, Snuff has a clever idea to outfox the villains and save the day. Narrated by Adrian Lester
Two ducks are mistaken for a rare African species after getting covered in soot
Whilst waiting to pick up Penfolds vacationing cousin from New Zealand, Pinfold, at the airport, Danger Mouse receives orders to stop Burt Badboys spree of mass statue defacement
The heroes quest to find the missing blossom

programmes.t: Boy Girl Dog Cat Mouse Cheese
programmes.d: K-Jam moves into the neighbourhood and stays with the family for a while, but Girl gets insecure and thinks that her awesome best friend is trying to take her place
Topical news magazine for children.
The Lemmings discover an ancestral tree that casts maledictions
The Lemmings find a futuristic underground site
SpongeBob attempts to become the first sponge to reach the surface of the ocean
When a Ms O from the past shows up at the office, Otto and Oscar must send her back to the day she came from or risk causing a time catastrophe
Charlie takes a three-headed monster dog to school for pet day, but his unwillingness to enforce the rules sees it grow bigger and more dangerous
Footballing legend Chris Kamara is coming to the leisure centre to unveil a statue that has been made of him. All Mick has to do is make sure no-one sees it before he arrives
Learn about measuring mass and capacity, and matching measures.
Your bodys largest organ is your skin - find out how it works and how to make your own homunculus!
Cam, Tyler and Aaron explore the wonders of the UKs wetlands

The team continues the search for deadly animals in the Arizona desert, where Steve Backshall demonstrates the hunting prowess of the Harris hawk by acting as its prey. He also uses state-of-the-art technology to track down rattlesnakes, before heading to the mountains in search of a cougar
Matilda celebrates award-winning American singer Aretha Franklin.
Amelia from Glasgow wants a den to celebrate her diverse international heritage

Dr Chris trains on a ward full of robotic patients, while Dr Xand opens the new Ouch-Mobile - a drop-in clinic helping to solve medical mysteries. Plus, in Accident and Emergency one patient has cut her nose and another has burnt his hand
A modern detective struggles to solve a series of murders in Emperor Caligulas house, and HHTV investigates allegations of cheating in Middle Ages jousting tournaments
Joy wants to open a luxury spa centre at Pottsfield and vlogger Luke Cutforth is the first guest. Danny and Mick must put together a luxury treatment
Andy has double-booked himself and must attend a family party rather than the band’s anniversary celebrations. Moxy plans a daring mission to break him out.
Adam and Joe finally find out which bro is funnier as they take to the stage and perform their best comedy acts to a huge crowd of kids.
Calico Jack and Kwazii attempt to move bombardier beetles to a more hospitable island
When the buggy gets a flat tyre, Big Lizard stumbles across a natural solution
The Princess is back and erases all weekdays so she can play at the weekend for ever. Danger Mouse must ruin everyones lives by fixing the problem
When Danger Mouse is responsible for Professor Squawkencluck losing her job, his clumsy attempts to get her back help the Baron steal half the world
The heroes let Mr Friendlyfaces niece tag along on a quest
Twin sisters ask the Ninjas to help them find them another flying rug to replace the one that they ripped, but its Konpekis pet snails who save the day.
Christmas Crafts and Cake or Fake
Christmas is coming, but there isnt much in the way of cheer at the flat or at school. Bell is in no mood to celebrate - he is being a proper Scrooge
Ginger reaches out to Ethan after his breakup, but he doesnt want to talk about it with anyone. Meanwhile, Matt needs hits for his web show, Cooking with Gastronomical
The flock discovers a set of bagpipes on the rubbish dump - but mistakes it for a sick emu
While helping Sergeant Slipper prove that he has what it takes to remain Beanotowns policeman, the gang unknowingly become entangled in a real theft by Doctor Pfooflepfeffer
When Hoofius plays his grandfauns old magical panpipes, his friends do exactly what he asks them to do

programmes.t: Boy Girl Dog Cat Mouse Cheese
programmes.d: Girl borrows Mouses latest invention to entertain her siblings. Its all fun and games until the innocuous blob threatens to engulf the whole family.

programmes.t: Boy Girl Dog Cat Mouse Cheese
programmes.d: When Lady Burlingtons precious jewels are stolen, the kids believe that Cat was the unwitting thief and didnt know that she was stealing. They try to put things right by returning the valuables and teaching Cat the error of her ways. However, with Lady Burlingtons security guard searching for the burglar, the kids find their task way trickier than anticipated.
Everyone goes for a ride on super-fast snowmobiles and launch into a race
SpongeBob and Patrick become trapped in an alternative dimension in which anything they draw comes to life
Tamara sprains her ankle and cant do the beep test, so decides to coach Debra-Jo.
A new room opens up in headquarters
As the gang hunt a Valentines monster that feeds on love, Charlie experiences his first crush. Is it real or a clever monster in disguise?
Everyone ends up lost after losing their jar of Yummy in a labyrinth
A sea bunny ruins Squidwards garden, but SpongeBob thinks it is cute
Liko and Meowscarada face off against a fellow Nidothing fan who really loves Litten.
The Octonauts take a vacation in an Earth Day special

Animated adaptation of the childrens book by author Julia Donaldson and illustrator Axel Scheffler, the creators of modern classic The Gruffalo. It follows the title character on an incredible adventure across the seasons as he runs from a playful dog, gets thrown into a river, escapes from a swans nest and even ends up on top of a fire. Will he ever get back to his family in time for Christmas? Martin Freeman heads the voice cast as Stick Man, with Hugh Bonneville, Russell Tovey, Rob Brydon and Sally Hawkins, plus Jennifer Saunders as the narrator

Adrian Lester narrates an animated adaptation of Mrs Armitage on Wheels. Inventor Mrs Armitage plans a short cycling trip to visit her cousin, with her faithful dog in tow. But she cant stop adapting her bike with horns, tool kit, and even a sail! Will she ever arrive? With the voice of Alison Steadman
Tish is extra curious today, but her mum and dad cant answer every single question of hers. Tish imagines a wonderous adventure with ants and answers the questions for herself
The bunny hides Sulas sparkly shoe in the toilet when the pair want to carry on playing together, but his friend may have to hop home when the footwear gets wet
The Teletubbies have fun bumping into one another and watch children in Tummy Tales play in bumper cars
Its the Tin Can Games and Evil Pea wants to win the trophy, so she cheats in the final race by putting a magnet on Supertatos back to stop him from going superfast
Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it’s the bagpipe-playing Chilli Peppers, melting Kiwi backstage and performing their song We’re Chilli When It’s Hot!.
Tee and Mo are having a picnic, but Tee spots his friends and wants to journey across the park... on his own! Should Mo let Tee out of her sight?

While looking for things to sell in their shop, Bing and Sula find their old friend Mr Rainybow - but his head is completely gone! So they decide to sell him, and after a nice lady buys his stacky bit for her toilet rolls, they look for some more things to sell. But then they find Mr Rainybows head and are sad that they cant get the rest of him back. However, Charlie loves to knock down Mr Rainybows rings!
Meet the Printing Crew - Yellow, Cyan, and Magenta. Learn how together they can mix lots of colours in the Printing Zone.
With Christmas approaching, Duggee wraps presents to go under the tree. He asks the Squirrels if they want to help decorate the clubhouse for Christmas
Disaster-prone parade-leader Eugene loses his hat, and then injures his leg, meaning it is up to Duggee and the Squirrels to take his place
Dad whinges that Bluey and Bingo are too different, so Bluey plans to make them more alike
Bingo uses her dance mode wishes on her dad!
GrimHQ crashes into the Baobab trees
Peters plan to collect the years first bluebell for his mother takes an unexpected turn when he finds it on Mr Tods doorstep
Kwazii and Tracker visit the desert for an Octo-Agent test but end up getting lost.
Ones idea of fun is singing, dancing and making friends by adding One! Learn to count to 10 by adding one with the Numberblocks
It is pandemonium at the Alphablocks Animal Sing-song - or does S have a special surprise in store?
Nick tells his grandson Remie about Barbara, an old school friend who wasnt friendly
Cat prepares to set off on another big adventure, but must first unpack the contents of her Cat-pack, which has become so full it is too heavy to carry
The bunny accidentally spills Krispos all over the kitchen floor when driving his car around the breakfast table - so tries to clean them up with a voo-voo cleaner
Dee encourages a friend to say ‘donkey and we go on a whirlwind word adventure
Lu feels sad when her flowery friend begins to droop.
Cherry wants to photograph a rare and shy butterfly. The Piggy Builders are eager to help, but they get so competitive they scare it away
The fruit tea-loving bird-like characters spot some hurdles in a field and decide to try going over them

Maddie meets Dominic to get ready for the day, sharing some cereal and brushing her teeth. Sorting out old toys makes Mr Tumble feel sleepy. Theres a jumble sale in the spotty surprise. Featuring signs for the words cereal, toothbrush and sleepy.
Its time to wake up but Tinky Winky isnt feeling well. Soon, Tinky Winky feels better but now Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po dont feel well

Giovanna and Baby Bear welcome babies Theo, River, Arthur, Reece, Luna and their grown-ups to The Baby Club. Parents, carers, and their little ones at home are invited to join in with all the fun activities too! Giovanna has got a blue bib and blue sunglasses inside her bag. All the parents and babies have different blue toys and objects in their bags too, which are explored through play, songs and a story. Parents, carers, and their little ones at home are encouraged to hide a safe, baby-appropriate blue object or toy inside a fabric bag or pillowcase, and then play with the items together! The traditional nursery rhyme Little Boy Blue features, as does a story about Baby Bear and Baby Tiger dressing up in blue things, and viewers at home show how theyve been exploring the colour blue too. The Together Song gets everyone moving about, before some calm time with sensory scarves and the Goodbye Song.
Elsee visits a shopping centre with her friend George and plays a game of I Spy.
When Maddie and Triggs realise its time for Uncle George to go, they try to stop him from leaving - its been a fun holiday, and they dont want it to stop
Dylan the photographer wants to take a great group photo, but when the group cant get it together, he needs to get creative
Kiri and Lou have a wild adventure delivering a giant fruit to Pania.
The Jungle Park is full of baby Vegesaurs. Ginger and the Pea-Rexes invent a game for everyone to play.
Its Bingos turn with Kindys Bob Bilby puppet and shes going to show him a good time!
Enid the cat is stuck up the tree, and Duggee and the Squirrels must think of a way to get her down
Five friends embark on an interstellar journey to explore fantastic planets, with the aim of learning about, playing and collecting games so they are never lost again.
Harriet helps Timmy find a painted egg in a treasure hunt

Its Mummys birthday! Henry, Sophie and Mama go on a secret shopping trip to find the perfect present. Back at home, Henry plans out a treasure map and sends Mummy on a heroic birthday adventure. Can she brave the hot lava? And will she find her presents?

Lolas family are from Spain, a country in southern Europe. She is making a traditional Spanish dish called empanadas for her and her friends. Lola begins by rolling out two pieces of pizza dough into big circles. She cooks one in the oven. Lola adds tomato puree to passata to make the filling. She also adds some canned tuna, green olives, and boiled egg. She seasons the mixture with paprika, black pepper and her special ingredient, oregano. Then Lola spreads the filling over the dough, which has been in the oven. She finishes the recipe by adding the last piece of dough on top and then putting it back in the oven to cook. Will Lolas friends find the empanadas tasty? Will they guess her special ingredient? Theres a very exciting Spanish surprise waiting for her friends while they enjoy their meal!
Rory and Sandy are out and about looking for newts, and Chantelle meets two special salamanders
The class has a visit from a vet, Evan, who gives the children advice on looking after pets. Evan asks Leon and Ottilie to help him check over the class guinea pigs
Series for young children that celebrates lots of different amazing machines. In this episode, motorcycle rider Grace shows off three amazing food machines

Dee encourages a friend to say slippers, and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. This episode is all about slippers - green slippers, blue slippers, little slippers and big slippers. We see prickly slippers and pom pom slippers, monster slippers and fairy slippers! The journey is repeated with some special surprises along the way, and everyone has a boogie when Dees friend finally succeeds in saying todays word!
Super-rectangle Twelve helps the super-excited Numberblobs work out how many tokens they need for each fairground ride. Learn about multiplication with the Numberblocks
Alphablock I comes across the Magical Alphaland SHOP. She wants to be impressed by the wares offered by its singing and dancing shopkeepers, Alphablocks SH, TH and CH
Ruby sings an upbeat song in which she imagines what it is like to be a raindrop falling from the sky
Go and Stop are having fun playing at the beach. They see their friends, The Three Bears, building sandcastles

Its time to colour Christmas. In this special song episode, Red and Green colour in all things related to Christmas with the help of the other Colourblocks. From a snowman to a Christmas tree and the mighty brussels sprouts, the Colourblocks eventually create a very colourful Christmas for all to enjoy.

The Squirrels are admiring everything Duggee has grown in his vegetable garden, especially his crop of giant carrots, when they hear a noise. They investigate and find the Rabbits busy preparing for the Carrot Solstice, the day when the sun is at its highest. On this day, they gather round Carrot Henge to celebrate the glory of this humble vegetable. Trouble is, the Rabbits need to go and get ready - but who will look after the carrots? The Squirrels volunteer, so off the Rabbits go. Looking after the carrots seems easy at first, and Norrie arranges tasks for everyone. Betty skillfully organises the queue while Roly is on toilet duty. And then, disaster strikes. Worm pops up and eats part of Carrot Henge. Duggee is dispatched to fetch one of his own giant carrots to fill the gap. As time ticks on with no Duggee in sight, the place gets busier, and the sun is nearly at the top. Will Duggee fix the Henge in time, or will Carrot Solstice be ruined?
Yukee and Stripes set up their own garden radio station but struggle to find music that keeps their audience happy.
Maddie meets Kian and Monroe at the park, where they gather natural materials together. Mr Tumble gets messy trying to paint a picture
Po collects lots of balloons and takes off into the air, floating high above Teletubbyland, until her balloons pop
Mr Hammond needs a picture of the sarcastic fringehead for his book about funny fish. But this aggressive fish doesnt have a picture in the Safari World database
Evie, Doug, Ruby and Ali rehearse for the school show at the Brooklyn-Bells house. Next door, a mystery box is delivered to Mrs Hobbs, and Waffle is desperate to know whats inside it
When James mentions that he needs a scarf, Alice decides to get him one as a gift. She discovers that Magnus and Ruby have learnt to knit and have made an orange scarf
Topsy accidentally rips the final page from her book, prompting the animals to try to track it down
The Game Catchers learn to play beanbag toss with aliens that like to monkey around
After Shellington crashes the Gup-D, he and Kwazii team up with a moray eel and grouper fish to pick up the pieces
A pine cone bowling rivalry between Peter and Nutkin gets out of hand and causes trouble

The Squirrels are rushing around, so Duggee shows them how to enjoy things at a slower pace. However, they soon come across Tortoise, who needs to get to the hospital as his wife is having babies. Duggee and the Squirrels need to get him there fast
When Daphne the giraffe is shy about her diabetes pump, Vida makes a sparkly bag for it
A toy dinosaur rampages through the supermarket and scares the Grape Kids, but Carrot and Supertato work out it is remote-controlled and try to get it back in its box
The Ducklings paint a picture, which Weasy learns to appreciate, but it ends up in the possession of the farmer, who has also fallen in love with the painting
Felix the pig grows to giant size and causes chaos, so Mojo and Bo have to get him back to normal before Swoppiton gets stomped
Dad whinges that Bluey and Bingo are too different, so Bluey plans to make them more alike
Bingo uses her dance mode wishes on her dad!
The Piris agree to mind a package for Shirley but discover it’s a precious egg! Watching over Eggy turns out to be exhausting, but then Shirley returns with unexpected news

Animated adaptation of Julia Donaldsons best-selling childrens book. It tells the tale of a little mouse who takes a walk through the woods in search of a nut, only to encounter a fox, an owl and a snake who all want to eat him. To escape their clutches, the quick-witted rodent creates an imaginary monster to scare away his attackers - but it turns out to be all too real. Robbie Coltrane heads the voice cast as the Gruffalo, with James Corden as the Mouse and Rob Brydon, John Hurt and Tom Wilkinson as the predators

JoJo discovers that Gran Gran used to be in a band with Grandad and decides that she wants to learn how to play the drums. Gran Gran teaches JoJo how to play to a beat and eventually they form a new band with Jared and Cynthia called JoJo and the Jammers!

Inside the little Toy House, everybody enjoys sharing books together. Mr Onion reads everybody a book thats all about how his friend Colly Wobble likes to be very silly. Colly Wobble likes the story very much - but what book is she reading?
The new table Major has made, collapses, spilling soup everywhere, but when Tiny and Small fetch some more soup, the trolley crashes into a new bump in the path to the soup wells
The Tombliboos proudly show everyone their bright white teeth, Makka Pakka arrives to wash their faces and the gang gets involved in a dance at the gazebo
Cricketer Abtaha Maqsood reads Not Now, Noor!, which tells the tale of a curious little girl who is trying to find out why her grown-ups wear hijabs
Tish is struggling to get out of bed, and Tash shows up to help her get ready for school. But this is going to be very difficult considering the bed is the cosiest place ever
Bing takes his Hoppity Voosh toy to the park, but accidentally leaves it behind. Amma helps him to focus so he can retrace his steps and locate the toy
Tinky Winky, Dipsy and Laa-Laa follow a trail of muddy footprints and find Po in bed with very muddy feet. The Noo-noo cleans off the mud

When 15-year-old Callum collapsed without warning in January 2025, doctors discovered a brain tumour. Now Callum is fighting to recover, but his future is still painfully uncertain

The first episode features versatile gravy that starts life totally vegan and gluten free so that its ready for whoever is coming for dinner. Continuing with maximum flexibility, Jamie shares a get-ahead stuffing that can be meat or vegetarian, frozen ahead of time so that its ready to be unwrapped for the festivities

programmes.t: 24 Hours in Police Custody: A Family Vendetta
programmes.d: Part one of a two-part special. Police receive a 999 call to an address in the quiet Cambridgeshire village of Bluntisham after a man has been fatally shot. Within minutes, a new emergency call is received for another shooting in another village just a 10-minute drive away. The new victim is the father of the first man found dead. Detectives establish that the motive for the double murder could lie in a dispute over who should have custody of the child of the first victim

Dermot Murnaghan launches the nightly update for Stand Up to Cancer 2025s week of fundraising action. Expect headline-grabbing celebrity stunts, powerful stories already grabbing the headlines and a look at whats still to come
Brendan unearths a mole in the IRAs ranks. Drama set in Northern Ireland during the Troubles, based on the book by Patrick Radden Keefe and starring Lola Petticrew and Hazel Doupe

Penny is in anaphylactic shock after a wasp sting and Warwickshire, Northamptonshire, Derbyshire, Leicestershire and Rutland air ambulance crews are on their way. The Essex and Herts air ambulance look after teenager Connor, who has broken his leg while doing tricks on his bike. Plus, motocross rider Carl needs Thames Valley air ambulances help after an accident leaves him with a dislocated hip

The trauma team rush to 67-year-old Walter, who has sustained a life-threatening head injury after falling down a remote hillside while walking with his sister. In Aberdeen, 62-year-old Liz has been rushed to hospital with a serious chainsaw cut to her arm, while 52-year-old Philip has crashed his motorbike at high speed and is lying in the central reservation of the motorway
Gordon Ramsay continues to help the lost owners of Iberville Cuisine, in the French Quarter of New Orleans. Will the staff have to walk out and implement their plan B?

Sara Bittorf goes undercover among the workforce of restaurant chain Boston Market, where she is chief brand officer. Disguising herself as an out-of-work waitress trying to win the chance to open up her own eatery by taking part in a bogus reality TV show, she tries to revive the companys image by learning more about its staff
When 15-year-old Callum collapsed without warning in January 2025, doctors discovered a brain tumour. Now Callum is fighting to recover, but his future is still painfully uncertain

The work of Manchester-based professor Caroline Dive, who is developing innovative blood tests to detect cancer, well before its visible on a scan. She is looking for tiny fragments of cancer DNA in the blood, which is comparable to searching for a needle in a haystack. Her innovative tests will also give clues on how to treat cancer, and in some cases cure. Taking part in her clinical trials are mechanic Lee, a medical mystery as doctors cant find where his cancer started, and Damian, who hopes to discover if his recent skin cancer will come back so he can move on with family life

programmes.t: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programmes.d: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer help the Clayton-Fishers, who have fallen out of love with their home in Walthamstow, east London. Sarah and her wife Pepper have opposing views on what to do with their two-bedroom terrace, as Sarah thinks it is time to move on, but Pepper is digging her heels in and wants to convert the loft
Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer host an extra helping of food and chat

Mercedes and Ste spiral as loved ones step in to help. Liberty tries to pull her family back together. Theresa returns to the village with her sights set on Dodger. Donny faces some hard home truths. And Lucass bid for Dillons attention reaches a concerning new height. Writers: James Coleman, Heather Robson; Dir: Sean Glynn; Prod Co: Lime Pictures
One of the Heffernans neighbours dies and Doug wants to buy his house - but suspects he may have competition in the form of actor Lou Ferrigno, who has offered to take care of the propertys lawn

When Doug and Carrie accidentally tape one of their arguments and play it back, they decide marriage counselling might be in order. To make things worse, Arthur gets hold of it and they become entertainment for a senior citizens group. With Kevin James and Leah Remini
Carrie finds out that while they were dating, Doug lied to her about getting a job in the hope she would be more inclined to sleep with him. Starring Kevin James and Leah Remini

Stefania, the woman Robert fell head over heels in love with during his holiday in Italy, turns up out of the blue with her father - but soon outstays her welcome. Comedy, guest starring Alex Meneses and David Proval
Ray buys a new vacuum cleaner that is intended to make housework easier for the family, but instead causes friction between Marie and Debra
Marie accuses Debra of not returning a cherished possession of great sentimental value, prompting a full-scale family argument over its whereabouts. Comedy, with Patricia Heaton

Niles and Frasier take an instant dislike to Martins new girlfriend Sherry, a brash barmaid at McGintys - but hide their feelings for fear of offending him. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

A childhood prank returns to haunt Frasier, who suffers pangs of guilt at the thought that he may have inadvertently caused the victim to embark on a life of crime. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce
The apartment block boards president denies Frasiers request to attach a knocker to his front door, leaving the shrink determined to fight his neighbours tyranny. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer

Eddie appears depressed, so Martin enlists the aid of a dog psychiatrist to determine the root of his misery, much to Frasier and Niless amusement. However, the diagnosis is that Eddie is picking up negative vibes from everyone around him, causing the Cranes and Daphne to assess their own lives. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and John Mahoney
Mike Wolfe takes an epic Route 66 road trip in an antique convertible to return it to the widow of its previous owner
Channel 4s midday news summary

At Chateau de la Boutiniere, Alison and Zion are hoping to complete an ensuite before Christmas and in the Pyrenees, Trish prepares for her first culinary workshop with a Michelin-starred chef. Jon and Carmen hold a festive medieval banquet

Jamie Oliver shares more festive recipes, including a salmon gravadlax starter for a modern twist on the traditional Christmas dinner. The chef also shares alternative ways to prepare turkey, roast potatoes and Brussel sprouts to shake things up on the big day, as well as a new take on national favourite the Yorkshire pudding
Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the words-and-numbers game where contestants pit their wits against the clock. Nisha Katona joins Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

Lee Juggurnauth helps retirees Marcia and Ron from Devon find a holiday home in Crete, Greece where they can take advantage of the climate, friendly people and beautiful beaches with a budget of £255,000

The magical Christmas HQ is filled with the sweet smell of festive flavours, as Kirstie Allsopps best Christmas hamper competition is staged. Four culinary crafters go up against the clock and each other to present five tasty delights, beautifully presented and ready to be gifted. Plus, the host reveals how to create a cute Christmas character for a Christmas tree, and revisits a straw-weaving wizard
Its the second day of finals week and as one couple host a trip to a bee farm, the second pair move into the prize BandB, hosting an evening meal and breakfast for the VIPs

Gary and Alison from south Staffordshire are seeking a rural holiday home in the Haute-Vienne area of central France. For their budget of £100,000, expert Laura Hamilton lines up five properties, but will any of them prove suitable enough to prompt the pair into making an offer?
Includes sport and weather
People affected by cancer share their personal and moving stories, in a series of short films in aid of Stand Up To Cancer

The work of designers as they decorate the halls of Britains biggest stately homes for Christmas. Here, Adrian Lillie, Charlotte Lloyd Webber and their leading team of crafters plan spectacular Wizard of Oz-themed installation at Castle Howard in Yorkshire, featuring an Emerald City, a Kansas prairie house, Dorothy, the Tinman, Scarecrow, four witches and a stunning 28-foot tree holding 3,000 baubles in many shades of green

Mary Manderfield investigates the viral phenomenon of Are We Dating the Same Guy groups online. More than 11 million Britons use online dating, with many women now turning to others for warnings or gossip about men who theyre dating. But are they a force for good, protecting young women from harm, or do they risk spreading lies about men that lead to real-world consequences?

Adam Hills, Josh Widdicombe and Alex Brooker are joined by celebrity guests including Guz Khan and Amy Gledhill for a comic review of the past seven days. As usual, the hashtag #isitok paves the way for the gang to round up, examine and explain the leading and most entertaining news stories of the week

Two Americans living in Athens meet in the heat of summer one whirlwind weekend. When Chloes time in Greece is drawing to a close, she decides to give up her high-flying job back home, and explore whether one weekends passion can stand the reality of the inevitable Monday. Romantic drama, starring Denise Gough and Sebastian Stan

A bad-tempered author returns to his home town for a Christmas festival celebrating his works. His publishing house sends a publicist along to keep him in line after some controversial online statements, and she begins to see the sensitive side he keeps well guarded. Romantic drama, starring Paul Campbell and Lyndie Greenwood

Rancher Erica has spent her whole life working the family farm with her mother and sister. When new arrival Aaron disrupts her plans, she starts to question what it is she actually wants. Romantic drama based on Jerry Todts novel, starring Peyton List and Andrew W Walker

Behind-the-scenes tales of Kensington Palace, which started out as Nottingham House until it was bought in 1698 by William III and transformed into a royal residence after a major renovation. Kate Williams explores some of the more gruesome pieces of palace history, including the grim death of Henry Stuart, the murder of Amy Robsart to clear a path for the queen, and the amazing story of Eleanor Cobham, the Royal Witch
The latest reports

In Sunderland, PC Will Hunter stops a driver who is dangerously overtaking other vehicles and gets out the breathalyser. Outside Newcastle, PC Brian Camsell stops a car with suspected cloned number plates, with the driver claiming to have bought the car that morning for cash - with no receipt. But a search of the car reveals a set of number plates and accessories often favoured by thieves
The latest reports

Rachel and Callum set out to stop an 82-year-old with a revoked driving licence who is failing to stop on the M1

An unlicensed driver flees from police, sparking a frantic pursuit involving firearms officers and a police helicopter. As officers track down a man suspected of driving without a licence or insurance, they find a surprise lurking in his boot - empty barrels and the stench of diesel. Also, police respond to a crash involving a young biker

First of a two-part documentary exploring one of the strangest cases in modern British history In May 2008, Swedish twin sisters Ursula and Sabina Eriksson travelled to England and caused carnage by running repeatedly into traffic on a busy stretch of the M6 in an apparent suicide pact. While Ursula was air lifted to hospital for emergency surgery, Sabina was arrested and held in custody, but an unnerving comment she made while in custody soon took on a dark dimension

Concluding part of the documentary. Sabina Eriksson is released from custody and meets 54-year-old Glenn Hollinshead, who offers her a place to stay. The next day he is found stabbed to death in his home and Sabina goes on the run before jumping off a footbridge over the A50, but she is arrested and goes for trial. With testimony from those involved in the case, including the prosecution lawyer, as well as those who spent time with Sabina, this film follows the lead-up to her trial and hears from the victims brothers about the devastating impact it had on their family

In Kettering, a wanted man abandons his car before running off into a park, with Sandra giving chase on foot, Tony using a drone, and handler Macca and his supreme sniffer dog Mac joining in. Matt arrests two over-the-limit football fans in the same evening, and Harrison and Tanya go on a mission to find out what a mystery driver is trying to hide

Some of the dramatic events to have taken place at Windsor Castle, which was built more than 900 years ago, guided by Edward III and his obsession with tales of Camelot. There is a look at one of the most popular exhibits at Windsor - Queen Marys Dolls House - and Kate Williams revisits some of the castles darker times, including the year when bubonic plague caused Queen Elizabeth to isolate at Windsor, and the death of Prince Albert in 1861
The latest reports

programmes.t: At Home with the Greens at Christmas
programmes.d: In this festive programme, Steve celebrates his 80th Christmas on the family farm and Peter is determined to make sure its their best one ever by doing all he can to assist with preparations. He helps with tree choosing, decorating and shopping, although he hands over the cooking duties with Jean to his wife Lin
The latest reports

After the body of local photographer Jenny Westlake is found dead lying among the stones at the popular tourist spot, The Nine Virgins, Cooper and Fry are called in to investigate. As the detectives learn about the belief that the stones represent women who danced on the Sabbath with the ability to grant wishes, suspicion focuses on those close to the old religion. But when the burned body of a man is found nearby, a truth begins to unravel that sends shockwaves through the team

Tensions run high as a man with potentially severed fingers becomes abusive while waiting his turn. He storms outside to smoke crack, forcing security to intervene. Farmer Paul arrives with a severely injured hand, worsened by delaying treatment to milk his cows. However, before his treatment begins, he suddenly convulses, prompting Nurse Eric to suspect a seizure

programmes.t: Surgeons: A Matter of Life or Death
programmes.d: This edition sees an urgent referral to Queen Elizabeth Hospital for 50-year-old Claire, who has a tumour growing at the bridge between her brain and her nose. Surgeon Shahz Ahmed must navigate through Claires nose and remove a substantial amount of tissue to gain access to the tumour. In another theatre, surgeon Moninder Bhabra attempts to repair a patients heart valve, which is a complex procedure that carries a risk of death

Theres a shortage of space on the specialist wards that admit casualty patients, meaning the department is at risk of complete gridlock. Barry is thrilled by the freedom his new driving licence brings, until Beverly insists he sticks to her 10 rules of the road at all times. Meanwhile, Pops refuses to wear an emergency alert bracelet and is forced to call Adam when he suffers a fall. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

Beverly is determined to make friends with her reserved and softly spoken neighbours, the Kremps, so she bombards them with invitations to a barbecue. Meanwhile, Barry and Erica battle for control of the familys telephone line and beg their parents to get a second one installed. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

An intoxicated Barney befriends two men after wandering out of his hotel room and decides to show them how to pick up women. Ted and Robin take a walk on the beach and end up having a heart-to-heart chat, while Marshall worries he is experiencing paranormal activity. American sitcom, starring Josh Radnor, Alyson Hannigan and Neil Patrick Harris

Barney cannot get out of bed on the morning of his wedding due to a major hangover. The gang tries to locate the far-fetched ingredients needed to concoct the famous Stinsons Hangover Fixer Elixir, so that he can attend a pre-nuptial photoshoot. Starring Neil Patrick Harris

Leonard, Raj and Howard kick Sheldon off their physics quiz team and replace him with Leslie Winkle, so he decides to prove his superiority by forming a rival quartet of his own. Johnny Gale and Jim Parsons star

Penny makes fun of Leonards habit of collecting sci-fi memorabilia, so he decides to give it up - but his friends object and do everything possible to persuade him not to change his ways. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Kaley Cuoco

In Swansea, married couple Leanne and Senol start things off with a feast of Turkish food, which hits the spot for fun-loving Paul and his partner Verity, though Pauls love of Hawaiian shirts doesnt go down well with Catrin and Josh, who dont like the hosts meaty main course either. On day two Catrin and Josh attempt some Welsh fine dining, but the complicated dessert fails to live up to its billing. Finally, Paul and Verity get a turn to impress with their version of good pub grub

The first hosts in Stoke, Robbie Williams superfan Trish and her husband Dave, go all out for a good old knees up. On day two, quirky young lovebirds Patrick and Lizzie host their first ever dinner party with an `eclectic" menu. They gamble on some wartime food and beginners luck, and things get emotional when theres praise at the table. Finally, seasoned hosts John and Lynne have a more traditional dinner party vibe on their night

Gordon Ramsay heads for Pasadena, California, where he visits Jamaican-themed restaurant Cafe Kingston. The business in run by Dr Una Morris, a micro-managing owner who also works at a radiotherapy clinic next door, and is determined to introduce hospital-style techniques to the kitchen by sealing everything in plastic bags

Charlotte Piggott and David King met five years ago during a night out in Toronto. Now he organises a winter wonderland wedding for his bride-to-be, but it remains to be seen whether she is happy with the result
Laid-back groom Courtney plans to throw a wedding for his controlling bride-to-be Lauren at the caravan park she goes to every year

Cindy Galardi Culpepper, CEO and Chairperson of Wienerschnitzel, the worlds largest hot dog chain, goes undercover in disguise to work among her own employees and find out about the quality of communication within the organisation. She hopes to discover what issues the staff might be having with the company in order to move it on to a brighter future

The business in run by Dr Una Morris, a micro-managing owner who also works at a radiotherapy clinic next door, and is determined to introduce hospital-style techniques to the kitchen by sealing everything in plastic bags

The chef heads to floundering soul food restaurant Blackberrys in Plainfield, New Jersey, but struggles to get his message across to indomitable owner Shelley. Her refusal to deal with the truth comes to a head when Gordon finds a dead mouse in the doorway, prompting him to step up his efforts to change her ways

Gordon Ramsay heads for Boston to help change the fortunes of a failing Italian restaurant run by two brothers. The eaterys decline began when one of the pair started embezzling money to fund his prescription drug addiction, and things only got worse when the he was sentenced to four years in prison. With the time now served, he has returned, but must first regain his brothers trust before he can save their business

Sheldon is flattered when a graduate student takes a shine to him, but she thinks his social life is distracting him from his work and removes him from his limited circle of friends by forcing him to work on a troublesome scientific problem. Guest starring Riki Lindhome

Pennys TV breaks down, so she heads to the boys flat to watch her favourite shows. However, Sheldon tires of her presence and bans future visits, leading to an embarrassing form of retaliation. Meanwhile, Howard and Raj search for the Americas Next Top Model house

Howard becomes convinced he has met his soulmate in the form of surgeon Stephanie Barnett, but he fails to realise she is far more interested in Leonard. Meanwhile, Sheldon and Raj argue about what to watch on TV. Sara Rue guest stars
Sheldon is delighted that Leonard has finally managed to find a girlfriend who meets his high standards, but his over-exuberance looks set to cause problems. Jim Parsons and Johnny Galecki star

Jimmy Carr hosts the irreverent panel shows version of the words-and-numbers game, with team captains Sean Lock and Jon Richardson joined by guests Kathy Burke and David Baddiel for comic innuendos, unpredictable conundrums and plenty of laughs. Alex Horne and the Horne Section join Countdowns resident lexicographer Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner, while Joe Wilkinson assists maths whizz Rachel Riley at the board
Greg Davies returns with the comedy game show. Doc Brown, Richard Osman, Jon Richardson, Katherine Ryan and Joe Wilkinson accept a potato-throwing challenge

The girls have been up all night revising for a big exam - and all of them are convinced they are going to fail. So when an opportunity to get out of the test presents itself, they jump at the chance - especially as it involves spending time with Father Peter, who everyone fancies. Comedy, starring Saoirse-Monica Jackson and Jamie-Lee ODonnell

The Quinns play host to Katya, one of a group of Ukrainian children who have been sent from their homeland in the wake of the Chernobyl nuclear disaster. But while Erin is excited about sharing her wisdom with her house guest, Katya turns out to be a lot less grateful to be in Derry than expected. Meanwhile, the rest of the family has other preoccupations - a new development in Granda Joes love life that leaves his daughters deeply unimpressed

Her refusal to deal with the truth comes to a head when Gordon finds a dead mouse in the doorway, prompting him to step up his efforts to change her ways

Beverly reignites a long-standing feud after she invites Murrays unreliable brother to visit at Thanksgiving. Meanwhile, Adam upsets the balance of power between him and Barry after he wins a ball game between them for the first time. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

Ericas new job at the department store is put in jeopardy when Beverly takes advantage of her daughters employee discount too frequently. Meanwhile, during a trip to the horse racing track, Pops bends the truth to convince Barry that his bad luck has changed for the better. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

Ted attempts to help a stressed Barney decide which suit to wear on the morning of his wedding. Lily believes that Robin is not treating the most important day of her life with the significance it deserves and the pair argue. Later, the gang watches an embarrassing film. American sitcom, guest starring Tracey Ullman and Jon Heder

Marshall asks Ted and Barney to help him figure out where Lily went on the night of their argument, and is shocked when he discovers the truth. Meanwhile, Robin is concerned when Barney starts to act like her father did on his wedding day. American sitcom, guest starring Kyle MacLachlan and Tracey Ullman

Sheldons friends all fall for his sexy twin sister, who is paying him a visit, but he declares he will have the final say on who can date her - an announcement that particularly dismays Leonard. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons

Penny finds out Leonards family never celebrated his birthdays, so she enlists Sheldons help to organise a surprise party, while Howard gets him out of the way by staging an emergency hospital visit. Kaley Cuoco and Johnny Galecki star

Stoke-on-Trent couples Rob and Rich, Eddie `The Beast" Hall and wife Alex, and Simon and spouse Lauren try to win £1,000 by throwing the perfect dinner party. Rob and Rich are first, going all-out to impress with fine dining cuisine

In Berkshire, beauty therapist Emma and her boyfriend Sean kick off the week with an night of acronyms, pet names and fine food. On day two, the experienced partnership of Jasbir and Sarb attempt to wow their guests with a night of authentic Indian food and Bollywood dancing. Finally, Mel and Tony host with a menu filled with traditional British classics in a bid to win the £1,000 prize

In this revisit episode, chef Gordon Ramsay goes back to Mojito, the Junction (formerly known as Flamangos) and Bazzini to check in with the owners he helped in the past and find out whether his advice has been put to good use. Will he be pleased with their progress?
Bride-to-be Anna has always dreamed of getting married in the family church in Norfolk, but her fiance Lee decides to plan a Vegas-themed wedding
Groom-to-be Bobby plans a nautical-themed wedding day, but his fiancee Jas dreams of an intimate local wedding

Lowell Hawthorne, the President and CEO of Caribbean food producers Golden Krust, dons a disguise to go undercover among the workforce in his own company. Lowell has ambitious plans for expansion and takes the opportunity to work alongside a cashier, two chefs and a forklift operator to find out what state his business is in.

First of a two-part special in which Gordon Ramsay heads to the Burger Kitchen in Los Angeles, where tensions are running high because owner Alan Saffron has spent his sons entire inheritance on the struggling restaurant. To make matters worse, the kitchen is run by a chef called David Blaine who shares nothing of his famous namesakes magic when it comes to cooking - and whose threatening behaviour regularly gets him into trouble

Gordon Ramsay heads for Bridgeport, Connecticut, to visit Cafe Tavolini, which is being neglected by husband and wife managers teetering on the edge of divorce. The estranged couples two children are struggling to save the business from their parents disputes, and the visiting chef tries to shock the pair into stopping the restaurant from becoming a casualty of their quarrel

Leonard turns to Penny for advice when his relationship with Stephanie takes off faster than he would have liked, and he realises he is the last person to notice that she has moved in with him. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Kaley Cuoco

Sheldons obsession with gift-giving etiquette annoys his friends as Christmas approaches. Meanwhile, Leonard is thrilled to meet an award-winning scientist, only to be filled with jealousy when his new colleague takes an interest in Penny. With guest star Michael Trucco (Battlestar Galactica, One Tree Hill)

Sheldon and the gang are excited when Barry Kripke challenges them to a robot duel. Meanwhile, Howard is devastated when Penny finally tells him what she thinks of his chauvinism. Guest starring John Ross Bowie

Sheldon decides to put his formidable brain power to use in devising a scientific procedure for making friends. However, to prove his findings he must first win the trust of fellow scientist Barry Kripke to gain access to a powerful computer. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons and John Ross Bowie

Jimmy Carr hosts a festive edition of the comedy panel shows version of the popular and long-running words-and-numbers quiz. Regular team captains Sean Lock and Jon Richardson are joined by guests Johnny Vegas and Katherine Ryan to provide more comic innuendos, festive surprises and laughs aplenty. Countdowns resident lexicographer Susie Dent takes her usual place in Dictionary Corner with David ODoherty, while mathematics whizz Rachel Riley is on hand to provide the letters and numbers
Greg Davies sets tasks for a group of comedians, with help from Alex Horne. In this edition, Jon Richardson strives to create the perfect music video

Its July 12 and the Quinns are rushing to get out of town before the Orange Parades start. They are packed and nearly ready to go when James, Michelle and Clare arrive as unexpected members of the escape party. To make matters worse, Aunt Sarah has recently started reading tarot cards and is predicting disaster for this trip - and it seems that for once, she might just be right. The only question is, when and how will things go wrong? Comedy, starring Saoirse-Monica Jackson, Jamie-Lee ODonnell, Dylan Llewellyn and Nicola Coughlan

Erin is over the moon when she manages to secure herself the editorship of the school magazine, The Habit. Especially when she uncovers an explosive story. Orla become obsessed by step aerobics, Da Gerry gets into trouble with Ma Mary and love is in the air for Aunt Sarah. Comedy, starring Saoirse-Monica Jackson, Louisa Harland, Tommy Tiernan, Tara Lynne ONeill and Kathy Kiera Clarke

Ste tries to do the right thing, but a text leads Lucas to jump to conclusions, a resident fights to keep the past hidden and Liberty tries to pull her family back together
Theresa returns to the village with her eyes set on Dodger, while Donny faces some hard home truths. And Lucass bid for Dillons attention reaches a concerning new height
Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos featuring sports of the lawnmower, motorcycle and bicycle variety

Gordon Ramsay comes to the aid of a restaurant in Mount Sinai, New York, which appears to be stuck in the 1980s. The crumbling decor and unenthusiastic head chef at the Handlebar need to be tackled, but owners Bill and Carolyn LeRoy are in denial about the problems they face

Beverly and Murray fall out over Barrys plan to perform his martial arts routine at the annual high school talent show. Pops buys Erica an electric guitar, urging her to take to the stage and sing. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

Beverly complains that Pops is spending too much time with her at home, so Murray takes him to work at the furniture shop. Meanwhile, Adam reluctantly gives away his old toys in an effort to make him look more grown up, hoping it will result in a kiss with Dana. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin
Lisas music teacher is horrified when Lisa is poached by the director of the Capitol City Philharmonic for his youth orchestra, but Homer and Marge struggle with funding her
Marge puts on a play written by Lisa when she gets a big job at the theatre, while Homer develops a crush on Maggies baby class supervisor

Leonard and Howard attempt to distract Sheldon with a trip to a historic railway when he slows the progress of their work on the Air Force guidance system. Raj and Stuart look after baby Halley, while Penny and Amy take Bernadette out

Amy is furious when she learns that Sheldon has shared intimate details of their relationship with his colleagues at the university, prompting their first fight since moving in together. Raj considers trying to live without financial support from his father, who thinks he is spoilt

Jay and Claire shoot an advert to rival a competitors catchy new campaign - but creative differences threaten to tear the father and daughter apart. Phil, Luke and Manny join forces to take down a Peeping Tom who has been using a drone to spy on a sunbathing Gloria, Cam worries about Lilys lack of singing skills ahead of a talent show, and Haley has a confession for Andy when hes rushed to hospital with appendicitis

Jay switches sides after joining Cams bowling team, while Phil and Claire see a different side to their neighbours. American comedy following the lives of three dysfunctional households - a man who struggles to keep up with his younger wife, an embarrassing husband and a gay couple getting used to parenthood after adopting a Vietnamese baby. Starring Ed ONeill and Julie Bowen

Amy finds she has romantic feelings for Pennys former boyfriend Zack, while Raj and Howard begin competing to prove which of them would make the better superhero. Comedy, guest starring Brian Thomas Smith

The guys have fun at the expense of Pennys boyfriend Zack, but later try to make amends by enlisting his help with the New Years costume competition at the comic-book store. Comedy, starring Kaley Cuoco and Simon Helberg
Leonards ingenious idea for a new smartphone app puts pressure on his friendship with Sheldon, who vies with him for control of the project. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Simon Helberg

Tension mounts when the pals attend a weekend science conference. Howard becomes argumentative after Bernadette runs into a former boyfriend, and the fallout causes chaos with the hotel room arrangements. Rick Fox guest stars, with Simon Helberg and Melissa Rauch

The prodigy studies his family for a psychology project. Thanksgiving dinner ends up in an argument when Georgie Sr is offered a job in Oklahoma. Comedy prequel to The Big Bang Theory, starring Iain Armitage

When the young genius learns that people with stunted childhoods can turn into social outcasts, he tries to act like a stereotypical child. Meemaw and Dr Sturgis relationship is tested when she teaches him how to drive

Homer suffers a bout of incontinence and has to wear a nappy, forcing Marge to ask eccentric boffin Professor Frink to help determine the cause of his condition. With the use of a dream machine, Frink breaks into Homers subconscious mind where a string of insecurities are exposed, including one involving his late mother

Theres a death in Springfield, while Krustys confidence takes a beating after he appears on a TV comedy roast with Sarah Silverman and Jeff Ross, prompting him to retire from the business. Lisa becomes worried for Homers safety, so sets out to prevent him getting hurt

Sheldons mother comes to visit and woos the gang, but he cannot help feeling jealous of all the attention she is receiving - until a bout of illness lays him low, and he suddenly sees the benefits of having her around. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons

Leonard has doubts about his feelings for Priya when he kisses a girl he meets in the comic-book store, while the rest of the friends play pranks on Sheldon in celebration of Halloween. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons

Amy is hurt to discover Penny and Bernadette went shopping for bridesmaid dresses without her. She first turns to a reluctant Sheldon for comfort and later tries to drown her sorrows. Comedy, starring Mayim Bialik and Kaley Cuoco

Leonard and Penny endure an awkward night at the cinema, both insisting the outing is not a date. Meanwhile, a terrified Sheldon enlists his friends help when a bird flies into his apartment, but his behaviour soon leaves them exasperated. Comedy, starring Johnny Gale, Kaley Cuoco and Jim Parsons

Homer stages a revolt against moves to give Springfield a new telephone dialling code, stirring up public indignation and splitting the town down the middle. Featuring the guest voices of the Who and Gary Coleman
Lisa joins an environmental protection group and begins campaigning in a last-ditch attempt to prevent the citys oldest redwood tree being felled by a rich Texan. With the voice of Joshua Jackson
Theresa risks her own safety to help a spiralling Mercedes, and a resident worries about what a scorned ex is capable of

Lisa tires of being followed everywhere by a lovestruck Ralph and hurts his feelings by blurting out in public that she cannot stand him - prompting disgruntled local lawman Chief Wiggum to harass Homer in retaliation

programmes.t: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer
programmes.d: Hosts Noel Fielding and Alison Hammond invite Oti Mabuse, Gabby Logan, David ODoherty and Suzi Ruffell to put their baking skills to the test, under the watchful eyes of judges Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith. The celebs take on an ice cream roll Signature challenge and a kids party favourite in the Technical, before creating their greatest fear in meringue form for the Showstopper

The armchair critics share their opinions on Wild Isles, Rise and Fall, Challenge Anneka, Race Across the World, The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer, This Morning and BBC News bulletins. From March 2023
Hopeful singletons shed their inhibitions at a private villa in Colombia in the hope of finding their soulmate. Reality dating show hosted by Rylan Clark

Student Charles is a self-confessed idiot who says his love life is a disaster, so he hopes to find a partner by going naked. Lee, also a student, identifies as non-binary and pansexual and is open to dating all genders. She hopes to find someone who will accept her for who she is

Sheldon is hurt when Professor Proton contacts Leonard for help, so he befriends TV scientist Bill Nye, and Raj gets jealous when Howard crashes a girls night in making home-made jewellery. Guest starring Bob Newhart, with Jim Parsons, Johnny Galecki, and Kunal Nayyar

Leonard becomes concerned that Sheldon will overreact when his friend learns the truth about a past indiscretion, while Penny confronts Rajs old flame Lucy about the way she ended their relationship. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

Charity worker Freddie, whos 27, is set up on a date with 22-year-old fashion buyer Rebecca, hoping that she will be the girl who will be able to get his unique sense of humour. Meanwhile, 36-year-old Army medic Lyn meets Steve, a 38-year-old ex-Army engineer, but the date takes an interesting turn when she reveals that she is pregnant. Elsewhere, 52-year-old Jazz singer Gina is set up with 57-year-old singer-songwriter Nik, and food buyer Cindy from Leeds goes on a date with sales representative Elan
